definitions.text: An unexpected event with negative consequences occurring without the intention of the one suffering the consequences, and (in the strict sense) not directly caused by humans.
examples: to die by an accident such as an act of God

definitions.text: casus; such unforeseen, extraordinary, extraneous interference as is out of the range of ordinary calculation.
Designating any form of transportation involved in an accident.
examples: The NTSB report revealed that the accident airplane was a Cessna 172.
